mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_approval_line (approval_item_code, dept_code, line_order, approver_name, approver_position, approver_email, approver_phone, approver_dept, has_final_authority, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{approvalItemCode}, #{deptCode}, #{lineOrder}, #{approverName}, #{approverPosition}, #{approverEmail}, #{approverPhone}, #{approverDept}, #{hasFinalAuthority}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_approval_line SET approval_item_code = #{approvalItemCode}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, line_order = #{lineOrder}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_position = #{approverPosition}, approver_email = #{approverEmail}, approver_phone = #{approverPhone}, approver_dept = #{approverDept}, has_final_authority = #{hasFinalAuthority}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
